source: Normal troop effects are mirrored from wos_sim/troop_catalog.py; T12 effects are mirrored from wos_sim/t12.py. Icons were cropped from the provided Battle Details screenshot codex-clipboard-46d7c452-55e4-4dc2-bb78-49edd5c3bb84.png.

crystal_shield.name: Crystal Shield
crystal_shield.effect: Chance to offset fixed incoming damage when hit.

ambusher.name: Ambusher
ambusher.effect: Attacks have a 20% chance to strike Marksmen behind Infantry.

incandescent_field.name: Incandescent Field
incandescent_field.effect: Fire Crystal energy that attaches to the Crystal Lance forms a force field that grants the Lancers a 15% chance of taking half the damage when under attack.

volley.name: Volley
volley.effect: Attacks have a chance to strike twice.

indomitable_wall.name: Indomitable Wall
indomitable_wall.effect: Reduces enemy damage inflicted by 0.6% per total level for 5 turns from the start of battle.

meridian_phalanx.name: Meridian Phalanx
meridian_phalanx.effect: Reduces Infantry damage taken by 1% per total level and increases Marksman damage dealt by 1% per total level for 5 turns from the start of battle.

starfire.name: Starfire
starfire.effect: Increases Marksman damage dealt every 5 turns by 0.5% per total level.
